microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **end-to-end recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned program execution to a scalable, repeatable model across cross-functional engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program in 4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across the broader platform organization.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating hardware, software, and firmware stakeholders across time zones.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring agile planning workflows to cut cycle time by 39% and increase program capacity by 21%, directly enabling the team to scale execution without proportional headcount growth.
microsoft_2023: Championed **adoption of AI-driven workflows** across 14 Azure engineering teams, conducting user demos and training sessions that embedded new code-generation tooling into daily developer practice and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** in program overhead.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation — a capability now used across iterative development cycles.

Improved **system requirements traceability** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, cutting stakeholder lookup time by 83% and reducing cross-team coordination friction.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework adopted across 140+ engineering and operations teams with competing program backlogs.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort per region launch**, then built a phased roadmap automating critical execution paths — directly reducing program risk and enabling faster, more reliable iterative delivery cycles.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of high-impact supply chain and deployment bottlenecks.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping hardware/software dependencies across 1,200+ robotic stations, and coordinating execution across cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Facilitated **Agile sprint ceremonies** — including planning, retrospectives, and backlog grooming — resolving 40+ high-priority tickets to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain program velocity across firmware and software workstreams.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable delivery model for embedded-systems updates across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM workflow that improved stakeholder communication and reduced scheduling friction across field and operations teams.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website, Google Business profile, and ad targeting to align outreach with high-value customer segments.

Strengthened leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had previously gone untracked across the estimating and invoicing workflow.

tailoring_notes: 'end-to-end development' (JD phrase) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#1 to mirror PES program lifecycle language.
'hardware/software dependencies' and 'embedded systems' (JD required qualifications) surfaced in amazon_robotics bullet#1 to directly address the hardware development process requirement.
'cross-functional engineering teams (Hardware, Software, Firmware)' mirrored verbatim in amazon_robotics bullet#1 and referenced in microsoft_ft bullet#4 to match the JD's exact org structure.
'iterative development' and 'agile and iterative methodologies' (JD phrase) woven into microsoft_2023 bullet#2 and amazon_robotics bullet#2.
'system requirements traceability' (JD requirement) directly named in microsoft_2023 bullet#3 to address the 'track system requirements' responsibility.
'supply chain' and 'material readiness' framing pulled into microsoft_2022 bullet#3 via 'supply chain and deployment bottlenecks' to hit the JD's supply chain qualifications.
